name: Spicy Pickles
tagline: The jar that started it all.
description: This is where Big Sexy's was born. Crisp, crunchy cucumbers hit with a triple threat of serrano, habanero, and fresno peppers — then slow-brined until every single bite snaps with heat and flavor. These aren't your grandma's pickles. They're crunchy, they're bold, and they don't apologize. One jar and you'll understand why people keep coming back.

name: Semi Sour Pickles
tagline: All the crunch. None of the fire.
description: Not everybody wants the heat — and that's okay. These semi-sours deliver that crisp, tangy, old-school deli crunch you crave. Garlic, dill, and a clean brine let the cucumber do the talking. Stack them on sandwiches, serve them on a snack board, or just eat the whole jar standing in front of the fridge. No judgment here.

name: Spicy Dilly Beans
description: The product that got Jesse hooked on brining back in 2008. Whole green beans, brined crispy with garlic, dill, and our signature pepper trio. They snap when you bite them. They burn (just right) going down. Drop one in a Bloody Mary and watch people lose their minds — or just eat them straight from the jar like a savage. Either way, you win.

name: Pickled Garlic
description: Whole peeled cloves, slow-brined with raw honey and our spicy pepper blend until they're soft, tangy, and absolutely addictive. Pop them straight, smash them into pasta, toss them on pizza, blend them into dressings — these cloves make everything better. If you love garlic, this jar will change your life. Fair warning: one jar is never enough.

name: Shoyu Garlic
description: East meets West in this one. Whole garlic cloves soaked in shoyu soy sauce with a whisper of serrano heat. The result? Deep, savory umami that hits different from anything else in our lineup. Drop them in ramen, toss them into a stir-fry, or just eat them one by one while you cook. Your kitchen is about to smell incredible.

name: Manuka Garlic
tagline: The fancy one. Worth every bite.
description: This is garlic dressed up for a night out. Premium Manuka honey meets our spicy pepper trio and a warm cumin-coriander spice blend, creating something rich, complex, and honestly kind of luxurious. The honey's sweetness plays off the garlic's bite in a way that'll make you close your eyes and just... appreciate it. Charcuterie boards will never be the same.

name: Maple Garlic
description: Real maple syrup and brined garlic — sounds wild, tastes incredible. The maple brings a deep, caramelized sweetness that wraps around the garlic and our pepper trio's heat like a warm blanket. Glaze it on chicken, fold it into a butter, or eat the whole jar with a fork. We don't judge. This one converts skeptics every single time.

name: Cowboy Candy
tagline: One bite and you're hooked. Guaranteed.
description: Candied jalapenos glazed with honey, garlic, and a mix of herbs that makes them dangerously addictive. Sweet on the front, heat on the back, and a crunch that doesn't quit. Pile them on burgers, stir them into cream cheese for the easiest appetizer of your life, or just stand at the counter eating them with a fork. This jar empties fast — you've been warned.

name: Escabeche
description: If you've ever been to a real taqueria, you know this one. Carrots and jalapenos brined in a tangy, oregano-seasoned brine — bright, crunchy, and absolutely essential next to anything with a tortilla. Tacos, tortas, burritos, huevos rancheros — escabeche makes them all better. This is the jar that sits on the table and never makes it back to the fridge.

name: Brined Jalapenos
description: Forget those sad, soggy rings from a can. These are crisp, tangy jalapeno slices brined with fresno pepper, garlic, and herbs for a clean, sharp heat that actually tastes like something. Pile them on nachos, layer them on sandwiches, scatter them across pizza — anywhere you want a hit of bright, honest heat. This is what jalapenos are supposed to taste like.

name: Brined Onions
tagline: The topping that steals the show.
description: Deep ruby red onions brined in red vinegar with a touch of agave and black peppercorn. They're tangy, slightly sweet, and impossibly vibrant. Put them on tacos and they'll outshine the meat. Drop them on a burger and people will ask what your secret is. They make salads look like art. Honestly, these might be the most versatile jar we make.

name: Brined Pineapple
tagline: Tropical heat you didn't know you needed.
description: Yeah, we brined pineapple. And it's incredible. Sweet, tropical chunks hit with serrano, honey, cinnamon, and clove — it's like a vacation in a jar with a little kick at the end. Game-changer on tacos al pastor, unreal alongside a cheese board, and honestly? It's dessert and a snack at the same time. This is the jar that makes people say 'wait, WHAT is this?'

name: Spicy Brined Okra
tagline: Southern snap with Big Sexy heat.
description: Whole okra pods, brined crisp with our pepper trio for a Southern-inspired snack that packs serious heat. These snap like a bean, burn like a pepper, and taste like nothing you've had before. Perfect in a Bloody Mary, killer on a snack plate, or just eaten one after another while standing at the fridge. The okra haters? They haven't tried these yet.

name: Spicy Brined Radish
description: Radishes already have a natural kick — so we leaned into it. Brined in a complex blend of agave, red wine vinegar, and our full pepper trio, these hit you with layers of heat: the radish's peppery bite first, then the habanero's slow burn. Crunchy, bright, and relentless. Toss them on tacos, pair with hummus, or brave them solo. Heat seekers, this one's for you.

name: Spicy Brined Turnip
tagline: The sleeper hit of the lineup.
description: Nobody expects turnips to go this hard. Earthy, crunchy turnip transformed by our fiery pepper trio and a touch of agave sweetness. Inspired by Middle Eastern pickled turnips but with a Big Sexy twist that turns heads at every market. Incredible alongside kebabs, shawarma, falafel — or just on their own as a snack that'll surprise everyone at the table.

name: Spicy Mixed Peppers
tagline: Our hottest jar. You've been warned.
description: This is the one. A straight-up medley of serrano, fresno, and habanero peppers brined with garlic, dill, and bay leaf. No filler, no buffer — just pure pepper power. Chop them into salsas, pile them on nachos, blend them into hot sauce, or dare your friends and film the results. Our hottest jar, and the one that heat lovers reach for first.

name: Spicy Purple Carrots
description: These purple carrots are stunning — deep violet outside, bright orange inside — and they taste even better than they look. Brined with our signature pepper blend and aromatic herbs, they bring crunch, color, and heat to any plate. The showstopper on a charcuterie board. The conversation starter at a dinner party. The jar that people pick up at the market just because it's so damn beautiful.

name: Brined Garlic 32oz
tagline: For the garlic obsessed. No shame.
description: You tried the 16oz. You finished it in a week. You're back for the big one. Same incredible recipe — whole cloves brined with raw honey and our spicy pepper trio — but in a full quart because you can never, ever have too much garlic. Cooks, garlic addicts, and repeat customers — this jar has your name on it.
